name: Skill Writer
description: Create/generate new skills from natural language descriptions using OpenCode CLI with multiple LLM providers.

create_skill.description: Generate a complete skill using OpenCode CLI with autonomous code generation, validation, and fixing.

bridge.description: Bridge to use for the skill (nodejs or python). Defaults to nodejs.

modify_skill.description: Modify an existing skill using OpenCode CLI by updating or adding actions within the current skill.
